description: Create an SLD style named 'composite_hatch' in the 'ne' workspace that applies a composite fill effect to polygons. The style must include three stacked visual elements in this order: a solid Light Grey background fill (#E0E0E0), a diagonal hatch pattern overlay using 'shape://slash' with Dark Grey stroke (#333333), size 8, and stroke-width 1, and a solid Black border outline (#000000) with stroke-width 0.5. Assign this style as the Default Style for the 'ne:ne_countries' layer. Log in to GeoServer at http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ (admin / Admin123!).
